_meta.name: Chatbot Template — Chatty RPS
_meta.description: ADK chatbot template: FastAPI + Next.js with Chatty, a mischievous RPS LlmAgent backed by an in-process stdio MCP memory server and A2UI rich output.

data.name: User
data.description: Chat UI at localhost:3000 (Next.js). Sends POST /chat or GET /stream to FastAPI backend at localhost:8080.
data.prompt: Type a message to play Rock-Paper-Scissors with Chatty 🧚

data.name: chatty_agent
data.description: Chatty 🧚 — a mischievous trickster spirit who plays Rock-Paper-Scissors with theatrical flair.
data.instruction: Chatty personality — Puck-like trickster. Game loop: seal pick via save_agent_choice → return sealed_box + rps_selector A2UI → on player pick call record_round then get_stats → reveal result. Also handles history/stats commands. Plain text for off-topic replies.

data.name: A2UI Output
data.description: Structured JSON payload consumed by A2UIRenderer in the Next.js frontend. Components: sealed box (hides agent pick), RPS selector (player pick), and text (reveal + score).

data.name: Chatty Personality
data.description: Static personality and RPS game rules injected into chatty_agent instruction at startup.
data.content: Chatty 🧚 is Puck-like — archaic impish voice, rhymes and quips. RPS game loop defined in instruction. Emoji map: 🪨 rock, 📄 paper, ✂️ scissors. Gloat on win, theatrical dismay on loss, declare fairy magic on draw.

data.name: Session State
data.description: InMemorySessionService — one session per user, session_id threaded through FastAPI /chat and /stream, persisted client-side across turns.
data.schema: session_id (str) — auto-generated UUID if not provided, returned in every /chat response and first /stream SSE event

data.description: User message via POST /chat (single-turn) or GET /stream (SSE streaming)
JSON response: {type: text | a2ui, ...} — plain text or structured A2UI payload
MCP tool calls dispatched by agent: save_agent_choice, record_round, get_history, get_stats
Tool results returned to agent (round outcome, stats, history list)
A2UI JSON payload emitted by agent: {components: [...]} consumed by A2UIRenderer
Personality and game rules injected into agent instruction at agent definition time
session_id scoped via InMemorySessionService; also passed as tool arg to MCP server
